CustomField.description: Minimum number of times the trigger must appear before generating any rule for it.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Ensures confidence is based on enough observations of the trigger. Example: If Airport A appears only 4 times and this is set to 6, no rules are created for Airport A yet—even if co‑occurrences meet MIN_SUPPORT—because the sample is too small for a reliable confidence.
CustomField.label: Minimum trigger count
